metadata.title: AIRI - Home
metadata.description: Advancing research, innovation, and exploration in artificial intelligence at the Technical University of Cluj-Napoca - AIRi@UTCN

Hero.title: Artificial Intelligence Research Institute
Hero.subtitle: Advancing research, innovation, and exploration in the field of artificial intelligence at the Technical University of Cluj-Napoca.

Notice.text: AIRi@UTCN is currently under construction. Follow our channels for updates.

About.title: About Us
About.description: The Artificial Intelligence Research Institute (AIRi) is a nexus for collaborative research at the Technical University of Cluj-Napoca. AIRi@UTCN promotes excellence in AI theory and practice, bringing together researchers across UTCN around a vision of open collaboration. Our work spans interdisciplinary research, AI literacy across disciplines, and impact through business and public co-creation partnerships.

research.description: Explore our research units and projects.

PageHeader.title: Contact Us
PageHeader.subtitle: We would love to hear from you! Whether you have a question about our research, events, or anything else, our team is ready to answer all your questions.

Event.title: “Progress and Innovation in Ophthalmology” Forum 2025
Event.desc1: The 3rd edition of “Eye and AI” workshop is jointly organized by the Department of Ophthalmology, “Iuliu Hațieganu” University of Medicine and Pharmacy, the Cluj County Emergency Clinical Hospital, and the Artificial Intelligence Research Institute (AIRi@UTCN), Technical University of Cluj-Napoca, Romania. Bringing together clinicians, researchers, and industry practitioners, the event explores how artificial intelligence is transforming ophthalmic care—from imaging and screening to decision support and workflow optimization.
Event.moderatorsNames: Adrian GROZA, Anca MĂRGINEAN, Radu-Răzvan SLĂVESCU
Event.paper1Title: Reconstructing Compact 3D OCT Volumes from B-scans: a Comparative Study of U-Net Architectures
Event.paper2Title: 3D Reconstruction Based on the AROI Set
Event.paper2Authors: Cristian Raul MOLDOVAN, Radu-Răzvan SLĂVESCU — Technical University, Cluj-Napoca
Event.paper3Title: Adapting Vision Foundation Models for OCT and Eye Fundus
Event.paper4Title: Segmentation of the Retinal Vascular Network and Biomarker Quantification in OCTA Imaging
Event.paper4Authors: Darius STAN, Raluca BREHAR — Technical University, Cluj-Napoca

industrial-phd.title: Industrial PhD
industrial-phd.p1: An Industrial PhD is known as a university training program that qualifies for the award of a doctorate through an industrial research or experimental development project, that was created collaboratively between a company and an academic environment, which will become the subject of a doctoral thesis by a doctoral student.
industrial-phd.p2: If you are a company and are interested in carrying out an industrial PhD, contact us via email.
industrial-phd.p3: If you want to come and do an Industrial Doctorate in Artificial Intelligence with us in any of the proposed topics, get in touch via email.

industry.title: Industry engagement
industry.description: Partner with AIRi on applied research and technology transfer, from discovery to deployment.

Hero.title: Engagement
Hero.subtitle: Connecting AIRi @ UTCN with the public, academia, and industry.

Public.title: Public Engagement
Public.desc: Connecting the AI research community with the broader public through accessible resources, media appearances, and outreach programs.
Public.f1Desc: Public talks, demonstrations, and community engagement initiatives.
Public.f2Desc: Open access materials explaining AI concepts to general audiences.
Public.f3Desc: Interviews, articles, and media coverage of our research.

Partnerships.title: Academic Partnerships
Partnerships.desc: A network of international academic collaborations, joint research programs, and institutional partnerships advancing AI research and education.
Partnerships.f1Desc: Joint research programs with leading universities worldwide.
Partnerships.f2Desc: Participation in CLAIRE, ELLIS, and other European AI networks.

Teaching.title: Teaching & Training
Teaching.desc: Courses, summer schools, and workshops for students and researchers at all levels.
Teaching.f1Desc: International summer programs in AI and machine learning.

Courses.title: Courses & Workshops
Courses.desc: Specialized courses covering machine learning, robotics, HPC for AI, and AI ethics.
Courses.f1Desc: Applied ML modules, projects, and research-oriented courses.
Courses.f2Desc: Hands-on labs in automation and vision systems.
Courses.f3Desc: GPU programming and large-scale AI training.
Courses.f4Desc: Fairness, explainability, and governance in AI systems.

Mobility.title: Co-tutoring & Mobility
Mobility.desc: International exchange programs, joint PhD supervision, and research visit opportunities.
Mobility.f1Desc: Joint PhD supervision with international partners.
Mobility.f2Desc: Funding for research stays and exchanges.

Collaboration.title: Industry Collaboration
Collaboration.desc: We partner with industry leaders to advance AI research and bring innovations to market. Our collaborations span consulting, joint R&D projects, and technology transfer.

HowWeWork.title: How We Work With Industry
HowWeWork.desc: We offer various engagement models to suit different industry needs and collaboration depths.
HowWeWork.f1Desc: Collaborative research projects with shared IP and outcomes.
HowWeWork.f2Desc: Expert advice on AI strategy, implementation, and best practices.
HowWeWork.f3Desc: Customized training for industry teams on AI technologies.
HowWeWork.f4Desc: Licensing and commercialization of research outputs.

HighSchool.desc: Competitions, events, and AI literacy resources for students and teachers, fostering the next generation of AI researchers.
HighSchool.f1Desc: AI and programming competitions for high-school students.
HighSchool.f2Desc: Workshops, lab visits, and sessions with experts.
HighSchool.f3Desc: Guides and materials for AI literacy.

Partners.title: Our Partners
Partners.desc: We collaborate with leading organizations in AI research and development, including CLAIRE, ELLIS, AIoD, euRobotics, ADRA, AI4Europe, and BDVA.

PhD.title: Industrial PhD Program
PhD.p1: An Industrial PhD is a university training program that qualifies for the award of a doctorate through an industrial research or experimental development project, created collaboratively between a company and an academic environment.
PhD.p2: If you are a company interested in carrying out an industrial PhD, or if you want to pursue an Industrial Doctorate in Artificial Intelligence with us, please get in touch via email.
PhD.f1Desc: Partner with us for applied AI research that solves real business challenges.
PhD.f2Desc: Combine academic research with practical industry experience.
PhD.f3Desc: Joint supervision between industry mentors and academic advisors.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: The Artificial Intelligence Research Institute (AIRi) is a nexus for collaborative research at the Technical University of Cluj-Napoca. AIRi@UTCN promotes excellence in AI theory and practice, bringing together researchers across UTCN around a vision of open collaboration. Our work spans interdisciplinary research, AI literacy across disciplines, and impact through business and public co-creation partnerships.

event1.title: Announcement of AI Institute at UTCN
event1.description: The Technical University of Cluj-Napoca announced plans to establish a dedicated Artificial Intelligence Institute to foster research and innovation in AI technologies.

event2.title: Groundbreaking Ceremony
event2.description: Official groundbreaking ceremony for the construction of the AI Institute building, attended by university officials and local dignitaries.

event3.title: Completion of Construction
event3.description: The construction of the AI Institute's state-of-the-art facility was completed, featuring modern laboratories and collaborative spaces.

event4.title: Inaugural AI Symposium
event4.description: The institute hosted its first symposium, bringing together AI researchers, industry experts, and students to discuss the latest advancements in AI.

event5.title: Current Building Progress
event5.descriptionPart1: Stay updated with the current building progress of the AI Institute.
